title: mentha × verticillata var. peduncularis
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. peduncularis, also known as pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is a variation of the peppermint plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of pineapple mint include its potential to alleviate headaches, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, pineapple mint is often used to make teas, infusions, and oils, which can be used to relieve stress, improve sleep, and freshen breath.
